title: Hallelujah
why_this_song: Hallelujah by Leonard Cohen (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 39 times; first heard in: "The baffled king composing Hallelujah"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Now I've heard there was a secret chord"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "But it's not a crime that you're hear tonight"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I know this room and I've walked this floor"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Now I've heard there was a secret chord"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hallelujah" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hallelujah" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now I've heard there was a secret chord
Her beauty and the moonlight overthrew her
There was a time you let me know

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: That David played, and it pleased the Lord
Well, maybe there's a God above

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Hallelujah" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Hallelujah" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Hallelujah", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Hallelujah", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Hallelujah" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Hallelujah" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
